 {'date': '2026-03-21 11:05:32',
  'headline': 'Transformational Opportunities: UBS Suggests 2 Longevity Stocks '
              'to Buy as the $8T Aging Boom Accelerates',
  'publisher': 'TipRanks',

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/sectors/healthcare/articles/transformational-opportunities-ubs-suggests-2-110532097.html'},
